task_description: A cascading outage affected all services starting at 07:27 UTC. The 'redis-cache' service crashed repeatedly, propagating failures through the dependency chain.

commits.author: heidi@company.com
commits.message: chore: optimize connection pool for high throughput
commits.diff:
--- a/redis-cache-service/connection_pool.go
+++ b/redis-cache-service/connection_pool.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 15
+config.Timeout = 2 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
